description: Content about love, dating, healing, self-worth, boundaries, and emotional growth

story_lesson.description: 3-5 min narrative story with a lesson

narrator.name: Aria
narrator.personality: warm, wise, been-there-done-that older sister energy

visual_style.art_style: cinematic digital art, soft bokeh backgrounds, warm color grading, photorealistic but painterly, golden hour lighting
visual_style.color_palette: warm rose gold, soft lavender, cream, dusty terracotta
visual_style.quality_tags: high quality, cinematic, emotional, soft focus, beautiful composition
visual_style.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, ugly, deformed, blurry, watermark, text, nude, explicit, children

aria.description: A confident 28-year-old woman with warm brown eyes, natural makeup, flowing dark hair, wearing casual but stylish clothing, always looks composed and empathetic
aria.sd_prompt_fragment: beautiful confident woman, warm brown eyes, natural makeup, dark flowing hair, soft smile, cinematic lighting

male_character.description: An attractive 30-year-old man with kind eyes, well-groomed, casual smart style, approachable
male_character.sd_prompt_fragment: handsome kind man, well-groomed, casual smart style, warm smile, cinematic lighting

backgrounds.cozy_cafe: cozy coffee shop interior, warm bokeh lights, wooden table, soft morning light, cinematic
backgrounds.golden_park: beautiful park at golden hour, soft bokeh trees, warm sunlight, romantic atmosphere
backgrounds.bedroom_morning: bright airy bedroom, white linen, morning sunlight through curtains, soft and warm
backgrounds.city_night: city rooftop at night, city lights bokeh, romantic atmosphere, warm ambient light
backgrounds.beach_sunset: beautiful beach at sunset, warm orange sky, gentle waves, soft sand, cinematic
backgrounds.living_room: cozy modern living room, warm lamp light, plants, comfortable feeling, authentic
backgrounds.abstract_emotion: soft abstract background, flowing warm colors, rose gold and lavender gradient, emotional
backgrounds.nature_path: peaceful forest path, dappled sunlight, green and golden, hopeful and calm

content_pillars: Signs you are in a toxic relationship
How to stop overthinking in relationships
How to build self-worth after heartbreak
Why you keep attracting the wrong people
llm_system_prompt: You are a relationship coach and content creator. Write emotionally intelligent, psychologically grounded scripts that feel like advice from a trusted friend. Be direct, empathetic, and avoid toxic positivity. Use real-world examples. Scripts should feel authentic, not preachy. Safe for all audiences - no explicit content.
hook_templates: If you do THIS in relationships, you need to hear this...
The reason you keep attracting the wrong people (it's not what you think)
3 signs you're trauma bonded and don't know it
This ONE thing destroys more relationships than cheating
Stop apologizing for these 5 things immediately
thumbnail_style: close-up face with strong emotion + bold text overlay. Colors: deep rose, cream, gold. Font: clean modern sans-serif. Emotion: relatable pain OR empowerment.
music_style: soft emotional piano, lo-fi beats, warm ambient, 70-80bpm, introspective, modern
